inst✝ : @IsKrullDomain A inst✝² inst✝¹

  intro x hx
  rw [← IsKrullDomain.biInf_eq_bot (A := A), Subalgebra.mem_iInf]
  intro p
  rw [Subalgebra.mem_iInf]

  let S := Localization.subalgebra (FractionRing A) p.1.primeCompl p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors
  have : IsDiscreteValuationRing (Localization p.1.primeCompl) :=

    Localization.subalgebraEquiv (FractionRing A) p.1.primeCompl p.1.primeCompl_le_nonZeroDivisors
  have : IsIntegrallyClosed S := IsIntegrallyClosed.of_ringEquiv e.symm
  exact (isIntegrallyClosed_iff (FractionRing A)).mp this (isIntegral_of_isScalarTower hx)
